entities.name: Advice Calibration
entities.context: V's practice of adjusting advice delivery based on what the recipient can cognitively handle

entities.name: Rule-first Learners
entities.context: People who want practical rules without theoretical explanation—theory doesn't help them

entities.name: Theory-first Learners
entities.context: People who need theoretical grounding before rules compute—can't follow rules without understanding why

relationships.context: One mode of calibration: give the rule directly, skip theory
Other mode: explain the theory first so the rule makes sense
Two contrasting learner archetypes that require opposite communication approaches
